Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 i 

Revision Log 

Date Changed by Revisions Version 
October 2022 K. Schneider Added new values for MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ORG_CD_1-5 and 
MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD. Added 8 new variables to the 
APL base file to account for the new operating authority values: 
OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1915AJ_IND, 
OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1932A_1915J_IND, 
OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1915BJ_IND, 
OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1115_1915J_IND, 
OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1915AK_IND,
